scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.check: cross-env BACKEND_HOST=localhost BACKEND_PORT=3000 npm run build && npm run lint
scripts.dev: cross-env BACKEND_HOST=localhost BACKEND_PORT=3000 FRONTEND_DIR="" PROXY_RESTART_URL=http://localhost:8765/internal/restart SCRIPTS_DIR=../../default-userscripts run-pty % npm run dev --workspace backend % npm run dev --workspace frontend
